classes.description: Instruction and governance surfaces that define how agents should operate in this repo.
Repo-local memory used for resuming work across stateless sessions.
Machine-readable bounded-node graph and node-budget data.
Proof artifacts, scorecards, preflight checks, and runtime verification outputs.
Product-facing source truth for either the simulator or Jobs Pulse node.
Human-readable mirrors or summaries that explain current repo state.
Prompt-era artifacts retained for auditability and historical context.

notes: Prompt-era evidence and internal doctrine are not automatically outward-safe.
